title: TightsPack
description: A Resource pack that changes the diamond to the Pink n White Tights and Netherite to Black n White. Also removes the texture of diamond / netherite chestplate and helmet because why do u need them when u have these great Tights?
body: A Resource pack that changes the diamond / netherite Leggins + Boots to the Pink n White Stockings. Also removes the texture of diamond / netherite Chestplate and helmet because why do u need them when u have these great Stockings?
